testcase.name: trust api normalization > normalizeTrustViewResponse produces a stable trust view-model
trust api normalization > normalizeTrustViewResponse keeps unknown policy posture stable when payloads are sparse
trust api normalization > normalizeTrustViewResponse keeps sparse event drilldown payloads safe
truth api normalization > normalizeTruthResponse maps approved truth metadata, provenance, and history
truth api normalization > normalizeCompareResponse maps backend truth version compare detail
truth api normalization > approved truth unavailable snapshot refuses non-approved fallback data
truth api normalization > normalizeTruthReviewWorkbench preserves policy, conflict, and impact detail safely
truth api normalization > normalizePublishReceipt preserves verified publish outcome and sparse comparison detail safely
truth api normalization > normalizeRollbackReceipt preserves verified rollback outcome safely
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > routes incomplete workspaces into setup studio
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > routes completed workspaces into backend-provided core route
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > falls back to truth when completed workspace points at non-product root
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > refuses internal-only routes as authenticated landing targets
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > defines a bounded production route list and a separate internal-only route list
resolveAuthenticatedLanding > keeps internal routes disabled by default
frontend env validation > requires production endpoints for CI/prod builds
frontend env validation > treats malformed optional flags as explicit build errors
useSourceIntelligence helpers > describeSourceSyncOutcome uses backend review object for queued review work
useSourceIntelligence helpers > describeSourceSyncOutcome reports candidate counts from backend review object
setup studio action shared > currentReviewConcurrencyMeta uses backend draft version and session id
setup studio action shared > parseReviewConcurrencyError recognizes explicit backend mismatch codes
setup studio action shared > parseReviewConcurrencyError recognizes baseline drift payloads as stale
setup studio shared state > createEmptyReviewState keeps concurrency containers available
setup studio shared state > normalizeReviewState preserves backend concurrency and draft version
